story_one_liner: Trump paused the US naval operation to escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz. Here's how five countries spun the same decision.
voice_style: calm-authoritative news explainer (think Vox / Johnny Harris)

audio.music_brief: subtle tension, low percussion under, drops out at 'now you know'

scenes.voiceover: One decision. Five countries. Five completely different stories.
scenes.visual_brief: Cold open. Black screen. Tap-tap-tap of breaking news. Cuts to a satellite shot of the Strait of Hormuz with vessel-tracker dots blinking.

scenes.voiceover: Tuesday — Trump paused 'Project Freedom', the US navy operation escorting ships through the strait. Same event. Five framings.
scenes.visual_brief: Footage of a US Navy warship cutting through Gulf waters. Cut to Trump at podium (stock).

scenes.voiceover: United States. Fox News calls it strategic patience. 'Pause to make a deal'. The blockade itself, they say, stays in full force.
scenes.visual_brief: American flag overlay. Quote card with Fox News logo. Side-text: 'paused for deal progress'.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇺🇸 USA: 'Pause for deal progress'
Fox News, CBC, Reuters
scenes.headline_quoted: US-backed pipeline proposal targets global reliance on Strait of Hormuz amid Iran threats — Fox News World

scenes.voiceover: Iran. Same day. Tehran's Supreme Leader declares the United States has suffered, in his words, a shameful defeat. The naval blockade, doomed to fail.
scenes.visual_brief: Iranian flag overlay. Crowd footage. Quote card with Press TV / Ahram styling.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇮🇷 IRAN: 'US suffered a shameful defeat'
Iran International, Ahram Online
scenes.headline_quoted: Iran president says US naval blockade 'doomed to fail' — Ahram Online

scenes.voiceover: China. Wang Yi: blockade not in common interests. Beijing positions itself as the new Gulf security architect.
scenes.visual_brief: Chinese flag overlay. Wang Yi shaking hands with Iranian FM Araghchi (stock). Map graphic showing 'new Gulf security framework'.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇨🇳 CHINA: 'Beijing as new Gulf broker'
CGTN, SCMP
scenes.headline_quoted: China's Wang Yi and Iranian FM support new regional security framework in Gulf — SCMP

scenes.voiceover: Pakistan. Dawn newspaper: Trump made the decision at the request of mediator Pakistan. They're claiming the win.
scenes.visual_brief: Pakistani flag overlay. FM Dar at podium (stock). Headline card from Dawn.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇵🇰 PAKISTAN: 'Pakistan brokered the pause'
Dawn, Geo News, NDTV
scenes.headline_quoted: Trump pauses effort to escort ships in Strait of Hormuz, citing deal progress — at the request of mediator Pakistan — NDTV / Dawn

scenes.voiceover: Russia. TASS frames it as Iran ensuring security 'after the threat is eliminated.' The threat being the US itself.
scenes.visual_brief: Russian flag overlay. Footage of Russian commentary. Cut to Iranian IRGC vessel.
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇷🇺 RUSSIA: 'Iran ensures security after threat eliminated'
TASS, RT
scenes.headline_quoted: Iran to ensure security in Strait of Hormuz after threat eliminated — IRGC, via TASS

scenes.voiceover: Same event. Five wildly different stories. Now you know. Follow for daily framing breakdowns.
scenes.visual_brief: Five flags fan into frame. End card with channel handle. Subscribe button bounce.

supporting_quotes_per_frame.exact_headline: US-backed pipeline proposal targets global reliance on Strait of Hormuz amid Iran threats
Iran president says US naval blockade 'doomed to fail'
China's Wang Yi and Iranian FM support new regional security framework in Gulf
US Unveiled Plan To Reopen Hormuz Hours Before Trump Shelved It — at the request of mediator Pakistan
Iran to ensure security in Strait of Hormuz after threat eliminated — IRGC

render_pipeline_hints.video_gen: Runway Gen-3 / Pika 2.0 / Sora — generate 5x 8-second clips per scene; keep each scene under 8s for clean stitching
render_pipeline_hints.voice_gen: ElevenLabs (v2 model) — single voice; ~150 words total fits comfortably in 60s at 150 WPM
render_pipeline_hints.captions: auto-burn from voiceover; bold the country name on each scene
